title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXVIII. Jingles.
content:
Little Jack a Dandy
            Wanted sugar-candy,
        And fairly for it cried;
            But little Billy Cook
            Who always reads his book,
        Shall have a horse to ride.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXVIII. Jingles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
